overall.description: First-person footage of walking along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest at night. The path is illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp, revealing tree trunks and undergrowth while the distance remains pitch black. The footage is dark and grainy with natural walking motion.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow dirt trail through dense forest, illuminated by a headlamp or flashlight

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dense forest at night along a narrow dirt trail. The scene is illuminated only by a flashlight or headlamp, revealing tree trunks and undergrowth immediately beside the path while the forest ahead disappears into darkness. The camera moves steadily forward through the enclosed natural corridor with no other visible agents or significant events.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dense, nocturnal forest along a narrow dirt trail. It begins with the camera pushing forward into an enclosed natural corridor, where a flashlight beam cuts through the oppressive dark. As the camera advances, the light reveals a rhythmic succession of tree trunks and tangled undergrowth immediately flanking the path. The scene maintains this steady progression, with the illuminated foreground contrasting against a distance that remains pitch black. Finally, the movement continues deeper into the woods, keeping the viewer locked within the narrow, grainy tunnel of light.
